title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: Verify that the "i" information button dialog is present next to the EQ headline in Device Settings and can be closed by clicking on it or anywhere on the screen.
steps: Open Device Settings and navigate to the EQ tab.
Check that the "i" icon is present next to the headline.

Click the "i" icon and verify a centered dialog appears over the EQ controls with the text: "Equalizer (EQ) enhances clarity by adjusting the frequency for your preferred sound signature. Changes affect music streaming, not telephony."
Click on the dialog or anywhere on the screen to close it.
expected: The "i" (information) button dialog is present next to the EQ headline in Device Settings and can be closed.
